lev5_seed0.question_text: Hi, I'm Ava. Let's begin. Tell me about yourself in as much detail as possible.
What TV shows or movies do you enjoy watching the most? Why do you like them?

Is there a park you really like going to? What’s special about it?
Tell me about the last time you went to a park. Who did you go with and what did you do there?
Tell me about an unforgettable experience you had at a park.
What kind of music do you usually listen to?
When do you usually listen to music?
When did you first get into music? How has your taste changed over time?

When you arrive at the theater, you realize you received the wrong tickets. Explain the issue to the ticket agent and suggest a few ways to fix it.
Tell me about a time you missed a concert or performance you really wanted to attend.
The way people shop has moved on over the years. How does shopping back then compare with shopping now, online buying included?
Buying things online doesn't always go smoothly. What problems do shoppers run into on the web, and how do they sort them out?
